TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Danilo_Medina, title = Danilo_Medina, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Danilo_Medina} }

S.FORM: Danilo Medina ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 11, Danilo Medina, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Dominican republic ta' misuw hya' ga Danilo Medina, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Danilo Medina htgan beh Arroyo,Cano .hiya spat mtsew hopa kawas nya.aring 18 kawas,hiya rasaw mqwas biru srxan Frente Revolucionario Estudiantil Nacionalista maki UASD. 1973 kawas Juan Bosch srxan Partido de la Liberación Dominicana .Medina tmwang uzi.hiya pcbaq cinci maki (INTEC).1984 kawas tmasoq pqwasan biru.aring 1983 kawas hiya PLD na hlahuy squilq.1986 kawas tmwang Congress na koka.2019 kawas Medina ru Cándida Montilla msqun la, maki cyugal kneril laqi Sibeli,Vanessa ru Ana Paula nya. 1990 kawas Medina,Leonel Fernández ru Juan Temístocles Montás msqun tmwang PLD sezi'.1994-1995 kawas, Chamber pincyougan mya maki Dominican .suruw lga,1996-1999 kawas ru 2004-2006 kawas Presidency na mtzyaw.1990-1994 kawas, hiya ga thzyazi sezi'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Danilo Medina ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 11, Danilo Medina, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Dominican republic ta' misuw hya' ga Danilo Medina, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Danilo Medina htgan beh Arroyo,Cano .hiya spat mtsew hopa kawas nya.aring 18 kawas,hiya rasaw mqwas biru srxan Frente Revolucionario Estudiantil Nacionalista maki UASD. 1973 kawas Juan Bosch srxan Partido de la Liberación Dominicana .Medina tmwang uzi.hiya pcbaq cinci maki (INTEC).1984 kawas tmasoq pqwasan biru.aring 1983 kawas hiya PLD na hlahuy squilq.1986 kawas tmwang Congress na koka.2019 kawas Medina ru Cándida Montilla msqun la, maki cyugal kneril laqi Sibeli,Vanessa ru Ana Paula nya. 1990 kawas Medina,Leonel Fernández ru Juan Temístocles Montás msqun tmwang PLD sezi'.1994-1995 kawas, Chamber pincyougan mya maki Dominican .suruw lga,1996-1999 kawas ru 2004-2006 kawas Presidency na mtzyaw.1990-1994 kawas, hiya ga thzyazi sezi'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *anilo me*ina rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *anilo me*ina, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *ominiʦ~ʨan repuβliʦ~ʨ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *anilo me*ina, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. *anilo me*ina ħtɣan βeħ arrojo,ʦ~ʨano .ħija s~ɕpat mts~ɕew ħopa kawas~ɕ nja.ariŋ ** kawas~ɕ,ħija ras~ɕaw mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕrxan *rente re*oluʦ~ʨionario es~ɕtu*iantil naʦ~ʨionalis~ɕta maki uas~ɕ*. **** kawas~ɕ *uan βos~ɕʦ~ʨħ s~ɕrxan parti*o *e la liβeraʦ~ʨi*n *ominiʦ~ʨana .me*ina tmwaŋ uzi.ħija pʦ~ʨβaq ʦ~ʨinʦ~ʨi maki (inteʦ~ʨ).**** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕan βiru.ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ ħija pl* na ħlaħuj s~ɕquilq.**** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ ʦ~ʨoŋres~ɕs~ɕ na koka.**** kawas~ɕ me*ina ru ʦ~ʨ*n*i*a montilla ms~ɕqun la, maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal kneril laqi s~ɕiβeli,*anes~ɕs~ɕa ru ana paula nja. **** kawas~ɕ me*ina,leonel *ern*n*ez ru *uan tem*s~ɕtoʦ~ʨles~ɕ mont*s~ɕ ms~ɕqun tmwaŋ pl* s~ɕeziʔ.****-**** kawas~ɕ, ʦ~ʨħamβer pinʦ~ʨjouɣan mja maki *ominiʦ~ʨan .s~ɕuruw lɣa,****-**** kawas~ɕ ru ****-**** kawas~ɕ pres~ɕi*enʦ~ʨj na mtzjaw.****-**** kawas~ɕ, ħija ɣa tħzjazi s~ɕeziʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
